rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §11.054 governs cumulative voting for school board trustee elections. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative interaction.
quote: Sec. 11.054. ELECTING TRUSTEES BY CUMULATIVE VOTING.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to school board election procedures, not property tax exemptions.
